---
title: "05. 逆极限与层级整体"
subtitle: "Inverse Limit and Layered Totality"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 5
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `inverse_limit_extensionality` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `inverse_limit_extensionality`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_05_inverse_limit_modular_tower.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
